name: Defense & Aerospace Sector
summary: Day 71 Saturday. **DEFENSE ROTATION REVERSAL DEEPENS — LOCKHEED $506.51 (-1.2% 1D, -18.8% 1M, -20.2% 3M) — CLEANEST 'CEASEFIRE TAKES THE WAR PREMIUM OUT' SIGNAL IN THE CYCLE.** ITA $223.49 (+0.4% 1D, -3.6% 1M, -4.8% 3M) confirms sector-wide unwind not LMT-specific. **Critically, LMT decline is happening DESPITE: May 7 IRGC destroyer attacks, May 8 second tanker disabling (M/T Sea Star III + M/T Sevda), CENTCOM 70-tanker blockade scale disclosure, Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz speech.** Markets are choosing the diplomatic-track narrative over the trinary-regime operational reality. This is either (a) right that the deal signs by May 14, or (b) a setup for a sharp reversal if Iran rejects past May 21 (StanChart $130-145 path per intel D). **Causal chain (~60% crisis-rotation reversal):** March-April defense bid driven by Iran-war tail risk; ITA peaked early-April; May 5 Trump pause + MOU framework circulation reduced perceived war-tail probability; defense rotation began unwinding mid-April; Lockheed -14.3% in April alone (Yahoo, Motley Fool). **Secondary chain (~40% earnings-specific):** Q1 2026 LMT earnings May 6 — EPS $6.44 vs $7.28 prior year, sales $18B (zero growth); supply-chain delays on F-35 + classified programs; fixed-cost contracts → margin compression; Morningstar trimmed FV to $640 from $660; multiple analyst downgrades. **Falsification:** if Iran rejects MOU and IRGC executes a non-symbolic kinetic action (civilian tanker disabling, Hormuz transit restart blocked at gunpoint), Lockheed back to $620+ within 5 sessions. URA $55.18 (-1.9% 1D, +8.3% 1M, +0.5% 3M) — was previously the rare asset benefiting from BOTH peace track (HEU custodian path) and structural AI power demand; both legs softening but uranium structural-AI bid intact. Reversibility: ~60% crisis component reverses on rejection scenario; ~40% earnings damage persists.

active_triggers.condition: ITA tests $208 sustained on Branch 3 deepening (3+ sessions)
Lockheed bounces +10% in 5 sessions on Iran rejection scenario = falsification of May 5 pause durability (back to $620+)
active_triggers.note: LMT $506.51 May 8; -18.8% MoM. Defense rotation reversal = market call MOU signs. If Iran rejects past May 21, sharp reversal expected.
